title: Incentives and Awards System for LMAs, Shipowners, Principals, or
content: 49 Employers. In consultation with the MITC, the Department shall establish and administer 50 an incentive and awards system for maritime industry stakeholders. 51 52 Deserving LMAs, shipowners, principals, or employers and other organizations or entities 53 shall be commended or awarded for their outstanding performance in upholding 54 seafarers' rights and complying with these Rules and R.A. No. 12021 and its IRR. 55 56 57 General and Miscellaneous Provisions 58 59
